en.atmosphere: Machida hub on Odakyu Odawara Line, 48 min to center. Medium-density residential, reasonable walkability.
en.landmarks: Odakyu shopping district with 12 restaurants. Pedestrian streets limited (1 reported). Parks nearby.
en.food: 12 listings, 5 izakaya, local spots (22). Solid mid-range.
en.nightlife: 6 midnight venues. Izakaya-focused, local scene. 92 crime per 10k (modest).

ja.atmosphere: 町田・鶴川。小田急の重要駅。中規模住宅地。中心まで48分。

ja.food: listings 12軒、居酒屋5軒、地点22。良好な中程度。
ja.nightlife: 深夜営業6軒。地元居酒屋文化。犯罪率は10万人当たり92。

ru.atmosphere: Machida hub на Odakyu Odawara Line, 48 мин в центр. Средняя жилая плотность, разумная ходьба.
